channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [IRMENERGY] IRM Energy Ltd Commissions 150th CNG Station, Expanding Green Energy Infrastructure
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IRM Energy Limited has reached a significant milestone with the commissioning of its 150th Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) station at Banaskantha on Tuesday, March 31, 2026. This achievement reflects the company's strong commitment to strengthening green energy infrastructure in its authorized geographical areas and driving the transition towards sustainable and eco-friendly transportation solutions. During FY26, a total of 39 CNG stations have been commissioned. IRM Energy Limited operates under authorizations granted by the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB) and has authorization for 4 Geographical Areas (GAs) namely Banaskantha (Gujarat), Fatehgarh Sahib (Punjab), Diu & Gir Somnath (Gujarat) and Namakkal & Tiruchirappalli (Tamil Nadu).

  • Commissioned 150th CNG station, reflecting strong commitment to green energy infrastructure
  • 39 CNG stations commissioned during FY26
  • Operates in 4 Geographical Areas (GAs)
  • Authorized by Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB)
  • Contributes to sustainable and eco-friendly transportation solutions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IRM Energy Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SEDEMAC] Sedemac Mechatronics Achieves Record-breaking Annual Sales of Control-Intensive ECUs in FY 2025-26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sedemac Mechatronics Limited has announced its highest-ever annual sales of control-intensive electronic control units (ECUs) for the financial year 2025-26. The company sold 3,901,075 control-intensive ECUs, marking a 60.0% increase from the previous financial year. Notably, the quarter ending March 31, 2026 saw 1,043,025 ECUs sold, a 65.1% growth compared to the same quarter in the previous financial year.

  • Sedemac Mechatronics achieved the highest-ever annual sales of control-intensive ECUs in FY 2025-26.
  • The company sold 3,901,075 control-intensive ECUs, marking a 60.0% increase from the previous financial year.
  • In Q4 FY25-26, Sedemac sold 1,043,025 ECUs, a 65.1% growth compared to Q4 FY24-25.
  • Sedemac Mechatronics is a leading supplier of control-intensive ECUs to OEMs in the mobility and industrial markets in India, the United States, and Europe.
  • The majority of the company's revenue comes from products incorporating novel control technologies developed in-house.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sedemac Mechatronics Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ADFFOODS] Regional Director Approves Scheme of Amalgamation Between ADF Foods (India) Limited and Telluric Foods Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Regional Director (RD) – North Western Region, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Ahmedabad has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation between ADF Foods (India) Limited [‘Transferor Company’] and Telluric Foods Limited [‘Transferee Company’], subsidiaries of ADF Foods Limited (‘Company’) and their respective shareholders and creditors under Section 233 of the Companies Act, 2013 read with Rules made thereunder. The merger will take effect from the appointed date as specified in the scheme, upon filing of the Order with the Registrar of Companies through e-form INC-28. The Transferor Company shall stand dissolved thereafter.

  • ADF Foods (India) Limited and Telluric Foods Limited, subsidiaries of ADF Foods Limited, have been approved for amalgamation by the Regional Director, North Western Region, Ahmedabad.
  • The amalgamation is intended to simplify the corporate structure, enable more efficient utilization of capital and resources, integrate business operations, eliminate duplication and rationalize administrative and compliance costs.
  • The Transferor Company shall stand dissolved after the merger takes effect from the appointed date.
  • The merger is in line with the Companies Act, 2013 and the rules made thereunder.
  • The Order for the amalgamation has been received on 2nd April, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADF FOODS LTD.-$ | Category: Merger

item.title: [CUMMINSIND] Cummins India Ltd Withholds Interim Dividend for FY 2025-26 Due to KYC Non-Compliance
item.description:
Cummins India Ltd has withheld the interim dividend for FY 2025-26 for shareholders who have not updated their KYC details against their respective folios. This decision is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) regulations and circulars. The company has sent individual emails/letters to the affected shareholders, informing them about the KYC non-compliance and requesting them to update their details. The dividend will be released only through electronic mode after successful updation of KYC details.

  • Cummins India Ltd has withheld the interim dividend for FY 2025-26 for shareholders who have not updated their KYC details
  • The decision is in compliance with SEBI regulations and circulars
  • Shareholders have been informed via individual emails/letters about the KYC non-compliance
  • The dividend will be released only through electronic mode after successful updation of KYC details
  • Shareholders are requested to keep their KYC details updated at all times

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CUMMINS INDIA LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [BIRLACOT] Birla Cotsyn India Ltd. Receives Stable Outlook Bank Facilities Rating from Infomerics Valuation and Rating Limited
item.description:
Birla Cotsyn India Ltd. (BCIL) has received a Bank Facilities Rating from Infomerics Valuation and Rating Limited. The long-term bank facilities of BCIL have been rated B+/ Stable (IVR B plus with Stable Outlook). The ratings are based on the strong promoter commitment, the company’s favourable working capital profile, its established spinning asset base, and early operational traction post-revival. However, the rating is partially offset by the company’s early stage of revival, high sensitivity to fluctuations in cotton prices and yarn realisations, and weak initial profitability.

  • Birla Cotsyn India Ltd. received a Bank Facilities Rating of B+/ Stable from Infomerics Valuation and Rating Limited
  • The rating is based on strong promoter commitment, favourable working capital profile, and established spinning asset base
  • The company has demonstrated early operational traction post-revival with a visible order pipeline
  • The rating is partially offset by the company’s early stage of revival, high sensitivity to cotton prices, and weak initial profitability
  • The Stable outlook is supported by the expectation that BCIL will be able to gradually stabilise its operations over the near to medium term

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Birla Cotsyn (India) Ltd | Category: Rating

item.title: [HILINFRA] Highway Infrastructure Ltd Faces Penalty of Rs. 26 Lakhs from NHAI
item.description:
Highway Infrastructure Ltd has received a show cause notice from the National Highway Authority of India (NHAI) due to the withdrawal of the Letter of Acceptance (LOA) for the operations of Venkatapalem Fee Plaza in Andhra Pradesh. This decision has led to a penalty of Rs. 26,33,000 imposed on the company. The company is requested to take note of this information.

  • Highway Infrastructure Ltd received a show cause notice from NHAI
  • The company withdrew the Letter of Acceptance (LOA) for the operations of Venkatapalem Fee Plaza in Andhra Pradesh
  • NHAI imposed a penalty of Rs. 26,33,000 on the company
  • The penalty was imposed due to the withdrawal of the LOA
  • The company is requested to take note of this information

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Highway Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [EASEMYTRIP] EaseMyTrip Becomes India’s First Listed Travel Company to Integrate with ChatGPT Apps
item.description:
🔥 Trending

EaseMyTrip, one of India’s leading online travel-tech platforms, has announced its integration with ChatGPT, making it India’s only listed online travel company to go live on the ChatGPT app. This integration allows users to discover and access EaseMyTrip through the apps section on ChatGPT, where they can simply input their travel requirements in natural language and receive relevant flight and hotel options instantly. EaseMyTrip continues to invest in new-age technologies as part of its broader strategy to expand beyond traditional travel booking and build a more integrated travel and lifestyle platform.

  • EaseMyTrip integrates with ChatGPT, becoming India’s first listed travel company to do so.
  • Users can now search for flights and hotels directly within a conversational AI interface.
  • This integration significantly reduces friction in the travel discovery process and enhances overall convenience.
  • EaseMyTrip aims to tap into the next wave of AI-led consumer behavior.
  • The company continues to invest in new-age technologies to expand beyond traditional travel services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Easy Trip Planners Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RBLBANK] RBL Bank's Deposits and Total Business Cross Rs. 2.5 Lakh Crore in Q4 FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RBL Bank Limited has informed the exchange about an intimation under SEBI Listing Regulations. The bank disclosed provisional financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The total deposits stood at Rs. 1,39,037 crore, with a significant YoY increase of 25% and a QoQ growth of 16%. Deposits worth less than Rs. 3 crore contributed Rs. 63,943 crore, up by 4% QoQ. The Current Bucket Collection Efficiency for the JLG segment was 99.7% for March 2026. The bank's liquidity coverage ratio stood at 130%. Total business crossed Rs. 2.5 lakh crore, growing 24% YoY. Secured retail advances grew 36% YoY & 17% QoQ, while retail advances grew 18% YoY and 10% QoQ. Unsecured retail advances increased by 2% QoQ. Wholesale advances grew 27% YoQ & 11% QoQ, with commercial banking advances up by 29% YoY & 9% QoQ. The retail-wholesale advances mix was approximately 59:41. The official announcement of financial results is subject to approval by the Audit Committee, the Board of Directors, and audit by the statutory auditors.

  • Total deposits reached Rs. 1,39,037 crore with a 25% YoY increase
  • Total business crossed Rs. 2.5 lakh crore, growing 24% YoY
  • Secured retail advances grew 36% YoY & 17% QoQ
  • Wholesale advances grew 27% YoY & 11% QoQ
  • Current Bucket Collection Efficiency for JLG segment was 99.7% for March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RBL Bank Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [CAPINVIT] Capital Infra Trust Clarifies Transaction Value in Previous Disclosure
item.description:
Capital Infra Trust has clarified the transaction value in its previous disclosure regarding the acquisition of units by Gawar Construction Limited. The per-unit price was stated as Rs. 68.36, and the aggregate transaction value is now clarified to be Rs. 1,14,59,870.40.

  • Capital Infra Trust clarifies transaction value in previous disclosure.
  • The per-unit price was stated as Rs. 68.36.
  • The aggregate transaction value is now clarified to be Rs. 1,14,59,870.40.
  • The clarification was made in accordance with the SEBI PIT Regulations and the UPSI Policy.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capital Infra Trus | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [QUESS] Quess Corp Ltd Receives ESG Rating of '74' from NSE Sustainability
item.description:
Quess Corp Ltd has been assigned an ESG rating of ‘74’ by NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics Ltd. The rating is based on publicly available information and was communicated to the company via email dated April 02, 2026. The company did not engage NSE Sustainability for this rating. The rating information is available on the company's website.

  • Quess Corp Ltd receives ESG rating of '74' from NSE Sustainability
  • Rating based on publicly available information
  • Company did not engage NSE Sustainability for this rating
  • Rating communicated via email dated April 02, 2026
  • Rating information available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quess Corp Ltd | Category: Monthly Update
